transcript_quality: partial — Granola meeting summary available; full transcript unavailable
lead_profile_text: R2R — Rent-to-Rent SA via Touchstone Education programme. New property investor. Targeting Warwick 2-bed: king bedroom + small double, 1 bathroom, unfurnished, near-new carpet. Owners in France (non-resident), happy to allow SA without AST. Tenants vacating end of June 2026. Viewing booked Tuesday 16 June. Third-room (dining room) conversion to bedroom discussed. Previously rejected London (90-day/licensing risk), Cambridge, and Cardiff (figures didn't stack). NOTE: All prior R2R entries (021, 024, 031, 035) resulted in Lost — margin viability after rent + bills + management fee is the historical pattern failure.
emotional_profile: Detail-oriented property investor educated via Touchstone. Sceptical of unverified deal-source figures — credibility and accuracy build more trust than salesmanship. Fast mover — decision expected within the week; follow-up call booked.
delay_timeline: Decision expected within the week; follow-up call Wed 17 June 2026 at 1:00 PM

top_objections.text: Figures from deal sources felt unverified
top_objections.zac_response: Walked through actual local comp data (1.5km radius, real properties) to address directly

top_objections.text: Licensing/planning concern — potential material change of use or HMO implications for third bedroom
top_objections.zac_response: Not a material change of use; council tax can be switched to business rates (~1 year process, likely zero-rated)

top_questions.text: What is the viable STL revenue for this Warwick 2-bed?
top_questions.answer: ~£2,100/month net average from 1.5km radius comps; best performer in area ~£46k gross/year; expect ~20% below average until reviews build

top_questions.text: Is converting the dining room to a third bedroom permissible?
top_questions.answer: Not a material change of use; council tax can be switched to business rates; recommend conversion if rooms are large enough, else games room with sofa bed

what_moved_them: Zac walking through actual local comp data (1.5km radius, real properties) — directly addressed the unverified-figures concern
HS2/M4 Junction 15 contractor demand angle (~12 min drive)
Hospital and ~2,000 local events/year as demand drivers
what_fell_flat: Nothing flagged — engagement was on data credibility, not product fit

conversion_gaps.gap: R2R rent cost to owners not confirmed — deal viability entirely unknown until rent is established
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Confirm rent before Jun 17 follow-up; if rent exceeds ~£1,200/month, surplus after £500 bills + management is negligible — say so clearly rather than letting deal drag (all 4 prior R2R entries Lost for this reason)
